### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>cpuguy83/go-md2man (github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/v2)</summary>

### [`v2.0.6`](https://redirect.github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/releases/tag/v2.0.6)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/compare/v2.0.5...v2.0.6)

##### What's Changed

-   Fix typo, add links, and formatting by [@​grahammiln](https://redirect.github.com/grahammiln) in [https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/128](https://redirect.github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/128)
-   README change binary name in usage example by [@​mikelolasagasti](https://redirect.github.com/mikelolasagasti) in [https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/126](https://redirect.github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/126)
-   gha: update golangci-lint to v1.62.2 by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/131](https://redirect.github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/131)
-   Preserve compatibility with go <= 1.17 by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/130](https://redirect.github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/130)
-   update minimum go version to go1.12, and test in gh by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/129](https://redirect.github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/129)

##### New Contributors
